race.comment: BEFUDDLE (3) is a leader who went close two starts ago at Sandown-Lakeside but found a rich feature at Mornington too tough following. Tackling a much more suitable race this time and she will be hard to beat. GO LEFT (5) showed plenty in his maiden preparation and is fourth up today and is likely to show more. She has gate speed and comes back in grade. Nolen is reunited, and that's a plus. STELLAR MOFEED (7) is close to breaking through. Led narrowly beaten over 1200m this grade at Cranbourne last time and she should manage 1400m this time around. PERFECT TEN (9) resumes and has been placed fresh. Will come into her own over longer journeys, but she's back in grade and owns a 1000m jumpout win at Cranbourne. Has inside gate and has to be kept safe.
